title: chore(deps): update dependency golangci/golangci-lint to v1.54.2
body:
[![Mend Renovate](https://app.renovatebot.com/images/banner.svg)](https://renovatebot.com)

This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Update | Change |
|---|---|---|
| [golangci/golangci-lint](https://togithub.com/golangci/golangci-lint) | patch | `1.54.1` -> `1.54.2` |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>golangci/golangci-lint (golangci/golangci-lint)</summary>

### [`v1.54.2`](https://togithub.com/golangci/golangci-lint/releases/tag/v1.54.2)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/golangci/golangci-lint/compare/v1.54.1...v1.54.2)

golangci-lint is a free and open-source project, built by people in their free time.
Also, the [linter authors](https://golangci-lint.run/product/thanks/) are an important part of golangci-lint.
If you use and appreciate golangci-lint please think to support us (golangci-lint maintainers and linters authors). :heart:

#### Changelog

-   [`07fb6ff`](https://togithub.com/golangci/golangci-lint/commit/07fb6ffd) build(deps): bump github.com/Antonboom/errname from 0.1.10 to 0.1.12 ([#​4026](https://togithub.com/golangci/golangci-lint/issues/4026))
-   [`2de4bc6`](https://togithub.com/golangci/golangci-lint/commit/2de4bc69) build(deps): bump github.com/Antonboom/nilnil from 0.1.5 to 0.1.7 ([#​4024](https://togithub.com/golangci/golangci-lint/issues/4024))
-   [`8000aba`](https://togithub.com/golangci/golangci-lint/commit/8000abaf) build(deps): bump github.com/nunnatsa/ginkgolinter from 0.13.3 to 0.13.5 ([#​4019](https://togithub.com/golangci/golangci-lint/issues/4019))
-   [`ac0627d`](https://togithub.com/golangci/golangci-lint/commit/ac0627dd) build(deps): bump github.com/polyfloyd/go-errorlint from 1.4.3 to 1.4.4 ([#​4030](https://togithub.com/golangci/golangci-lint/issues/4030))
-   [`f787bc7`](https://togithub.com/golangci/golangci-lint/commit/f787bc70) build(deps): bump github.com/sashamelentyev/usestdlibvars from 1.23.0 to 1.24.0 ([#​4016](https://togithub.com/golangci/golangci-lint/issues/4016))
-   [`fb50d99`](https://togithub.com/golangci/golangci-lint/commit/fb50d99e) build(deps): bump github.com/securego/gosec/v2 from 2.16.0 to 2.17.0 ([#​4015](https://togithub.com/golangci/golangci-lint/issues/4015))
-   [`2741ab2`](https://togithub.com/golangci/golangci-lint/commit/2741ab2a) build(deps): bump github.com/tetafro/godot from 1.4.11 to 1.4.14 ([#​4029](https://togithub.com/golangci/golangci-lint/issues/4029))
-   [`be49b5a`](https://togithub.com/golangci/golangci-lint/commit/be49b5aa) build(deps): bump go.tmz.dev/musttag from 0.7.1 to 0.7.2 ([#​4017](https://togithub.com/golangci/golangci-lint/issues/4017))
-   [`3736e09`](https://togithub.com/golangci/golangci-lint/commit/3736e093) build(deps): bump honnef.co/go/tools from 0.4.3 to 0.4.4 ([#​4018](https://togithub.com/golangci/golangci-lint/issues/4018))
-   [`3db5817`](https://togithub.com/golangci/golangci-lint/commit/3db5817e) build(deps): bump honnef.co/go/tools from 0.4.4 to 0.4.5 ([#​4022](https://togithub.com/golangci/golangci-lint/issues/4022))
-   [`411e0bb`](https://togithub.com/golangci/golangci-lint/commit/411e0bbb) fix: add all directories as safe git directories inside the Docker image ([#​4034](https://togithub.com/golangci/golangci-lint/issues/4034))
-   [`a5eaf9f`](https://togithub.com/golangci/golangci-lint/commit/a5eaf9fe) govet: add directive and slog passes ([#​4028](https://togithub.com/golangci/golangci-lint/issues/4028))

</details>

---
